Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: May 2026

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing e5enclave.com, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use this site. E5 Enclave Incorporated ("E5," "we," "us") operates this website as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.

Use of Content

Content on this site is provided for educational and informational purposes. Research publications, dispatches, and data are published under open access. You may share and cite with attribution. Commercial reproduction requires written permission from E5 Enclave Incorporated.

Intellectual Property

Unless otherwise indicated, all content on this site is the property of E5 Enclave Incorporated or its contributors. The E5 name, logo, and associated marks are trademarks of E5 Enclave Incorporated. This website is built with human-directed design and human-reviewed content.

User-Submitted Content

Coalition applications, contact forms, and other submissions become the property of E5 Enclave Incorporated. We may use submitted information to process your request, respond to inquiries, and improve our programs. We do not share personal information with third parties except as required by law.

Disclaimers

This site provides information about E5's research, programs, and mission. Nothing on this site constitutes legal, financial, or tax advice. Research published represents the findings of E5's research framework, not endorsement of specific legislation candidates, or political positions.

Limitation of Liability

E5 Enclave Incorporated is not liable for any damages arising from the use of this website. This site is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States. Disputes shall be resolved in Miami-Dade County, Florida.

Contact

Questions about these terms: accounts@e5enclave.com
